title: The New industry
description: A modpack, with automation mods (create) and a (great) RPG side.
body:
# The New Industry Modpack :
### A challenging modpack for your brain.
Features :
Automatise, ressources with create mods and addons. Use the trains as a new transportation mode.
Fight, mobs are powerful, and dungeons are riskier, even with an high end stuff.
Shoot, use weapons to strike ennemies, like never in minecraft.
Trade, use coins to trade with villagers after fighting for your life against pillagers.
Explore, discover new biome, in overworld, in the end, or in nether, and make your journey unique. Breathtaking views with distant horizons and shaders.
Highly optimized, play in modded minecraft, even with a potato.

## Notes :

This modpack is made by a regular minecraft player, expect bugs and strange things (even if according to my tests they are very rare).
The mods aren't from me.
RAM recommandations : 4gb without shaders ; 6gb with shaders ; 8 or more is optimal in all situations.
